"'''Incident at Horn Station'''" is an 18-page comic featured in [[Star Wars Tales 2|''Star Wars Tales'' #2]]. It was written by [[Dan Jolley]], pencilled by [[Sean Phillips]], lettered by [[Sean Konot]], colored by [[Matt Hollingsworth|Matthew Hollingsworth]], and edited by [[Peet Janes]].

==Plot summary==
A stuttering, nervous-seeming rock miner arrives at [[Horn Station]], requiring emergency repairs on his ship's stabilizer. He is told he'll have to wait two days for a new stabilizer to come in. He goes to the local [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] and meets a friendly Human woman named [[Kirry]] and an unfriendly non-Human brute named [[Kerlo]], the latter of whom demands the newcomer's [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. The two go for their guns, and the miner shoots Kerlo down. A [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] comes in and invites the miner to a showdown against professional [[blastfighter]] [[Shoto Eyefire]], tomorrow, just after sunrise.

The next day, the miner goes to Shoto's fortress and enters the arena, confronted with two men on high platforms carrying rifles. Shoto enters and, after a few moments, yells "NOW!," and, a split second later, is shot in the legs by the miner. The miner takes out a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and injures the two riflemen, throwing [[Stun grenade/Legends|stun grenades]] around to keep the audience busy. He plants a detonator and leaves, destroying Shoto's fortress.

The next day, as the miner-[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], dressed in full robes, prepares to leave, Kirry asks for his name. He says he'll tell her next time he sees her, and leaves.
